title: scutellaria subintegra
intro: Scutellaria subintegra is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the skullcap or helmet flower. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria subintegra include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Scutellaria subintegra can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
